analysis.consistency: The spell description is internally consistent. Details regarding cage shape/size, creature interaction, and escape mechanics are clearly defined.
analysis.quality: High quality. The mechanical implications are well-articulated, especially regarding the difference between the cage and box forms, and the specific interaction with teleportation/planar travel saves.

forms.dimensions: Up to 20 feet on a side
Up to 10 feet on a side
forms.structure: Solid barrier preventing matter passage and spell effects

effects: Traps creatures completely inside the initial area.
Pushes partially included or oversized creatures out of the area.
Requires a successful Charisma saving throw to bypass via teleportation or interplanar travel (failure wastes the attempt).
Blocks ethereal travel (extends to the ethereal plane).

analysis.archival_notes: The material component cost (1,500 gp) is significant and should be noted for tracking.
